CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "MOL - REAGENTS (NON-RAD) MOLECULAR BIOLOGY") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "MOL - REAGENTS (NON-RAD) MOLECULAR BIOLOGY") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "MOL - REAGENTS (NON-RAD) MOLECULAR BIOLOGY"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "Molecular Biology Reagents - MOL"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "MOL"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "24-MOL")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-MOL
